## Description

**Phase:** [1, 2, 3, or 4]  
**ID:** [1.1, 2.3, etc.]

- [ ] [Specific, measurable outcome 1]
- [ ] [Specific, measurable outcome 2]
- [ ] [Specific, measurable outcome 3]

## Deliverables

[List code files, modules, or functions that should exist after this milestone is complete.]

## Related Issues

## Notes

[Implementation hints, gotchas, or references to docs/diagrams.]
